lede: A look at November 23 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Miley Cyrus and Franklin Pierce, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Arab Spring
events.desc: Arab Spring: After 11 months of protests in Yemen, Yemeni president Ali Abdullah Saleh signs a deal to transfer power to the vice president, in exchange for legal immunity.

events.title: MV Explorer (1969)
events.desc: MS Explorer, a cruise liner carrying 154 people, sinks in the Antarctic Ocean south of Argentina after hitting an iceberg near the South Shetland Islands. There are no fatalities.

events.title: Rose Revolution
events.desc: Rose Revolution: Georgian president Eduard Shevardnadze resigns following weeks of mass protests over flawed elections.

events.title: Queen (band)
events.desc: Queen lead singer Freddie Mercury announces in a statement that he is HIV-positive. He dies the following day.

events.title: 1980 Irpinia earthquake
events.desc: The 6.9 Mw Irpinia earthquake shakes southern Italy with a maximum Mercalli intensity of X (Extreme), killing 2,483–4,900, and injuring 7,700–8,934.

events.title: Jacques Mayol
events.desc: Jacques Mayol is the first man to reach a depth of 100 m (330 ft) undersea without breathing equipment.

events.title: Tarawa
events.desc: World War II: Tarawa and Makin atolls fall to American forces.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: HMS Rawalpindi is sunk by the German battleships Scharnhorst and Gneisenau.

events.title: Manchester Martyrs
events.desc: The Manchester Martyrs are hanged in Manchester, England, for killing a police officer while freeing two Irish Republican Brotherhood members from custody.

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: Battle of Chattanooga begins: Union forces led by General Ulysses S. Grant reinforce troops at Chattanooga, Tennessee, and counter-attack Confederate troops.

births.name: Franklin Pierce
births.line: American general, lawyer, and politician, 14th President of the United States

births.name: Anne Burns
births.line: British aeronautical engineer and glider pilot

births.name: Alfonso X of Castile
births.line: King of Castile and León from 1252 to 1284

deaths.text: Louis Malle, French-American director, producer, and screenwriter
Roald Dahl, British novelist, poet, and screenwriter
Emperor Fei of Jin, emperor of the Jin Dynasty

observances.text: Christian feast day: Alexander Nevsky (Repose, Russian Orthodox Church)
Christian feast day: Blessed Miguel Agustín Pro – one of Saints of the Cristero War (Roman Catholic Church and the Lutheran Church)
Christian feast day: Pope Clement I (Roman Catholic Church, the Anglican Communion, and the Lutheran Church)
